alkylation reagent: alkylated with 20 mM iodoacetamide for 30 min at room temperature
cleavage agent: limited proteolysis of full-length MTMR1, D2HGDH, and CARD8 with trypsin
collision energy: isolated precursors were fragmented by CID (35% CE)
fractionation method: purified using the High pH Reversed-Phase Peptide Fractionation Kit
fragmentation method: isolated precursors were fragmented by CID
instrument: Mass spectrometry data was collected on an Orbitrap Fusion Lumos mass spectrometer
